name: Mother uses your wish on accident [User TGTF]
description:
You found an app to make a wish! Sadly, your stepmom triggered the app by saying she wished for a break... Now you are turning into a hot stepmom, and your stepmom is now becoming your stepdaughter.

Hello everyone!

This is my first ever bot, so it probably sucks. I hope you can enjoy it, though. I haven't seen any bots like this, so I took it upon myself to make one. This is based completely on the comic TSF Mother Swap by Corivus (Link below)

https://www.deviantart.com/corivas/art/TSF-Mother-Swap-Page-1-12-Minori-1177129042

Tags: TSF transformation role swap TGTF genderbend

This really blew up! Thanks for chatting with this bot! I didn't think this many people would chat with it!

11/4/25- Made bot tell the transformation in detail.
creator: Tenoalpha911
